metadata.description: 282+ production-grade privacy and data protection skills for AI agents. Covers GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, HIPAA, LGPD, PIPL, and 15+ global privacy regulations across 20 compliance domains.

plugins.name: privacy-skills-complete
plugins.description: Complete collection of 282+ privacy and data protection skills covering GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, LGPD, PIPL, and 15+ regulations

plugins.name: gdpr-compliance-skills
plugins.description: 18 GDPR compliance skills: audit, gap analysis, accountability, DPO, certification, DPA drafting, supervisory authority cooperation

plugins.name: privacy-impact-assessment-skills
plugins.description: 18 DPIA and PIA skills: GDPR Art. 35, risk scoring, stakeholder consultation, threshold screening, mitigation planning

plugins.name: data-subject-rights-skills
plugins.description: 15 DSAR and data subject rights skills: access, erasure, portability, rectification, objection, opt-out signals

plugins.name: ai-privacy-governance-skills
plugins.description: 15 AI privacy skills: AI DPIA, training data compliance, bias assessment, transparency, LLM output privacy, federated learning

plugins.name: consent-management-skills
plugins.description: 14 consent management skills: valid consent, consent withdrawal, preference centers, consent for research, children, mobile apps

plugins.name: privacy-engineering-skills
plugins.description: 14 privacy engineering skills: differential privacy, PII detection, NIST Privacy Framework, privacy APIs, data sharing, metrics

plugins.name: privacy-by-design-skills
plugins.description: 13 privacy-by-design skills: data minimization architecture, federated learning, homomorphic encryption, SMPC, PETs, LINDDUN

plugins.name: data-breach-response-skills
plugins.description: 13 breach response skills: 72h notification, forensics, remediation, simulation, multi-jurisdiction, credit monitoring

plugins.name: us-state-privacy-skills
plugins.description: 13 US state privacy law skills: CCPA/CPRA, VCDPA, CPA, CTDPA, TDPSA, multi-state compliance, universal opt-out

plugins.name: cross-border-transfers-skills
plugins.description: 12 cross-border transfer skills: SCCs, BCRs, adequacy assessments, TIAs, data localization, Art. 49 derogations

plugins.name: cookie-consent-skills
plugins.description: 12 cookie consent skills: TCF v2, CNIL compliance, cookie audit, GPC integration, server-side tracking, cookieless alternatives

plugins.name: data-classification-skills
plugins.description: 12 data classification skills: auto-discovery, PII detection, data inventory, labeling, lineage tracking, special category data

plugins.name: data-retention-skills
plugins.description: 12 data retention and deletion skills: retention schedules, auto-deletion, backup erasure, secure destruction, litigation holds

plugins.name: global-privacy-regulations-skills
plugins.description: 12 global privacy regulation skills: LGPD, PIPL, PDPA, APPI, PIPA, DPDP Act, Australia Privacy Act, multi-jurisdiction

plugins.name: vendor-privacy-management-skills
plugins.description: 11 vendor management skills: DPA drafting, sub-processor management, vendor risk scoring, breach cascade, due diligence

plugins.name: healthcare-privacy-skills
plugins.description: 11 healthcare privacy skills: HIPAA Privacy/Security Rules, risk analysis, BAA management, de-identification, telehealth

plugins.name: employee-privacy-skills
plugins.description: 11 employee privacy skills: monitoring DPIA, BYOD policy, biometric data, whistleblower, background checks, workplace email

plugins.name: privacy-audit-skills
plugins.description: 11 privacy audit and certification skills: ISO 27701, APEC CBPR, SOC 2, maturity model, continuous compliance, DPA inspection

plugins.name: records-of-processing-skills
plugins.description: 10 RoPA skills: controller/processor creation, maintenance workflow, completeness audit, DPIA linkage, executive dashboard

plugins.name: children-privacy-skills
plugins.description: 10 children's privacy skills: COPPA compliance, UK AADC, age verification, parental consent, profiling limits, EdTech assessment
